title: [Discontinued] [LMaG] Laynus' Majiic & Guns
description: A mix of features including magic, guns, and skill progression, all wrapped up within Create's automation.
body:
# Welcome to LMaG!

### A big 2.0 overhaul of CRPG.
Implements a mix of features ranging from magic, guns, armors, swords, tools and so much more.

This modpack is more catered to bigger multiplayer groups with differing tastes on how minecraft modpacks should be. _I'm hoping to scratch that itch every friend in the group has_

**Enjoy exploring with frineds via airplanes and boats!**
> New biomes and realms, all amped up to new highs and lower lows.
> Per person loot so there arent any loot ninja's holding all the diamonds

**Plenty of new gear to keep things fresh for everybody**
> Adds a lot of new content and more end game features
> Adds a lot of different and varied furniture to keep the homesteaders happy

Join the discord [here](https://discord.gg/59enFbPAEB) and talk with me and my friends._All the minds behind the modpack_

Props to the gentlemen who made quark for a variety of fixes and implementations https://modrinth.com/mod/quark


--Server side version will be implemented... _eventually_
